calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn For Order Compelling Response To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents And For Sanctions Rhereon And Mtn For Deemed Admissions And For Sanctions Thereon
Off Calendar May-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Asset Recovery Group, Inc.'s Motion For Order Compelling Response To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents, To Deem Request For Admissions Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Moving party is advised that the register of actions shows that the matter was removed from the master trial calendar on October 28, 2008 as there were no appearances and the matter was ordered dismissed. If the matter remains active, responses and production are ordered within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-27-2008 Dismissal - No Appearance
